On this page

Flying â

Before flying you should ensure that your vehicle is calibrated and configured, and that you have followed the instructions in the Safety section. In particular, you should set appropriate Safety Failsafes and a Geofence. You should also read the First Flight Guidelines.

Basic instructions for flying are covered in the vehicle-specfic topics:

  • Multicopter
  • Fixed-wing

How to fly an autonomous mission is covered in Missions.
